title: Supreme Court SIR Verdict LIVE: SC upholds validity of SIR in Bihar, says EC acted in interest of free, fair election
content:
The Supreme Court has upheld the validity of 'SIR' (presumably a specific electoral practice or regulation) in Bihar.
*   The Court affirmed that the Election Commission (EC) acted appropriately in this context.
*   The EC's actions were deemed to be in the interest of ensuring free and fair elections.

title: Supreme Court verdict today on pleas challenging SIR of electoral rolls in Bihar
content:
The Supreme Court will deliver its verdict today.
*   The verdict concerns pleas that have challenged a specific process.
*   This process is the 'SIR' (Special/Summary Intensive Revision) of electoral rolls in Bihar.

title: Forex reserves can be used when sentiments pull INR down: Experts
content:
Here are 3 bullet points summarizing the headline:

*   Experts suggest using India's forex reserves to stabilize the Indian Rupee (INR).
*   This intervention is recommended specifically when the INR depreciates due to negative market sentiment.
*   The reserves act as a tool to counteract a fall in the Rupee driven by investor psychology rather than fundamental economic factors.

title: SEBI to unveil bond ETF to boost retail investor participation
content:
SEBI is preparing to introduce a new financial product.
*   This product will be a bond Exchange Traded Fund (ETF).
*   The primary goal is to increase participation from retail investors in the market.

title: SEBI plans pilot project for tokenisation of corporate bonds, rollout may take 6-9 months
content:
Here's the summary in 3 bullet points:

*   SEBI is planning to launch a pilot project.
*   The project will test the tokenisation of corporate bonds.
*   A full-scale rollout of this tokenisation framework is anticipated to take 6-9 months.

title: Budget 2024: Finance Minister Nirmala Sitharaman announces special schemes for Bihar
content:
Here are 3 bullet points summarizing the headline:

*   During the presentation of Budget 2024, significant announcements were made.
*   Finance Minister Nirmala Sitharaman was the one who made these declarations.
*   The key focus of her announcement was the introduction of special schemes specifically aimed at benefiting the state of Bihar.

title: China plans a giant overseas renewable energy plant with 1,000 turbines and millions of solar panels
content:
Here's the summary in 3 bullet points:

*   China is planning a giant overseas renewable energy plant.
*   The facility will incorporate 1,000 wind turbines.
*   It will also feature millions of solar panels.

title: Who is Ironmouse? VTuber and Twitch icon shares inspiring treadmill milestone amid serious health struggles
content:
Ironmouse, a well-known VTuber and Twitch icon, is the subject of the news.
*   She recently achieved and shared an inspiring milestone on a treadmill.
*   This accomplishment is notable given her ongoing serious health struggles.

title: Haryana lawyer moves Election Commission to register Cockroach Janta Party
content:
A lawyer from Haryana has approached the Election Commission.
*   The purpose is to register a new political party.
*   The proposed name for this party is the 'Cockroach Janta Party'.

title: Taint of defection is not vaporised by resignation, Supreme Court had said in a judgment
content:
The Supreme Court has ruled that the negative consequence, or "taint," of defection persists.
*   This "taint" is not removed or "vaporised" even if an individual resigns.
*   The judgment emphasizes that defection carries lasting implications despite subsequent actions like resignation.
